company_type: Life Sciences, Diagnostics and Applied Chemical Markets

dependencies: Parts requiring custom design work are not readily available from alternate suppliers due to unique design or length of time necessary for design work
Dependence on contract manufacturers and outsourcing portions of supply chain including logistics and third-party package delivery services
Some parts may experience shortages, extended lead times, limited supplies or increased prices due to capacity constraints
risks: Manufacturing capacity may not match demand for products
Contract manufacturers may fail to perform obligations in timely manner or at satisfactory quality levels
Disruptions in third-party package delivery or logistics providers
Supply chain disruptions from catastrophic events (fire, flood, terrorism, public health crises, extreme weather, earthquakes)
Supplier discontinuation of parts requiring product re-engineering
Excess manufacturing capacity during economic downturns affecting margins

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations and similar foreign regulatory agency requirements for products and services
EU In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation (EU IVDR) with stricter requirements effective May 2022
Government contracting laws and regulations compliance
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and U.K. Bribery Act anti-corruption requirements
Data privacy and security laws including EU GDPR, Brazil's Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados, China's Personal Information Protection Law and Data Security Law, California Consumer Privacy Act
Environmental protection and health and safety laws and regulations
Toxic Substances Control Act (TSCA) regulations by U.S. EPA
Sanctions imposed by U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control
Forced labor laws in various jurisdictions
SEC Final Rule on Cybersecurity Risk Management, Strategy, Governance and Incident Disclosure
OECD Pillar Two rules establishing global minimum tax rate of 15 percent

sanction_risks: Sanctions imposed by U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control and similar laws
Trade embargoes and sanctions as trade barriers
Tariffs enacted by U.S. government on various imports from China
Tariffs imposed by Chinese government on certain U.S. goods
Potential escalation of trade war and retaliatory measures
Uncertainties and instability caused by conflicts in Ukraine/Russia and Middle East
Political and trade uncertainties in greater China region
